title: 47 morto che parla
writer: Ettore Petrolini, Agenore Incrocci, Nicola Manzari
plot: The story is set in a small town near Naples in early 1900. Baron Antonio Peletti is a stingy, cruel man who lives in a luxurious house, but only spends the bare minimum on the needs of his son and future daughter-in-law.
